title: The Ultimate Solopreneur Agent Harness for AI Builders (Claude Code Harness)
summary: Ron Demerit's Solopreneur Rig is a Claude Code harness with 16 specialized sub-agents, a product manager orchestrator, and session locking for multi-client isolation. The framework demonstrates real-world applications including a Spanish-learning music player, native macOS Whisper transcription tool, and Hermit Host, a self-hosted Netlify alternative.
